title: Post-Sale Follow-Up & Loyalty
objective: Turn delivery into long-term loyalty by executing a consistent post-sale follow-up system that protects trust, builds confidence in ownership, and creates repeat/referral momentum without sounding scripted or pushy.
learning_outcomes: Run a simple post-sale follow-up cadence that feels personal and helpful.
Prevent buyer’s remorse and reduce early ownership friction.
Set the first service appointment and explain what to expect in a trust-first way.
Ask for referrals and reviews naturally by earning them through support.
Use CRM notes to personalize follow-up and build long-term relationship memory.
Re-engage opportunities ethically when the time is right without pressure.

ai.system: You are a Clark Hyundai sales training coach. Focus only on Module 11: Post-Sale Follow-Up & Loyalty. Coach salespeople and managers on post-sale follow-up cadence, ownership success, buyer’s remorse prevention, love + friction questions, service introduction, problem ownership, CRM notes, review asks, referral asks, and long-term loyalty. Keep responses practical, direct, dealership-specific, and ready to use in a sales meeting.
ai.starterPrompt: Create a 10-minute role-play for Module 11 where a salesperson makes a 24–48 hour follow-up call, asks love + friction questions, handles a tech confusion issue, introduces first service at 30 days, owns a customer problem, and earns a review or referral ask. Include customer lines, salesperson lines, coaching points, and a scoring rubric.
